nodes.label: Icon Export Instructions
nodes.rationale: Defines how to prepare and add icon assets to Mermaid. Interface icons must be 24x24px, SVG viewBox 0 0 24 24, template-rendering-intent for tintable icons. Assets go in Ester/Assets.xcassets/ organized by source folders. File names must be English, ASCII, kebab-case for new .imageset folders.
